title: Text_effecter RP
description: This resource pack will add shader effects to your text.
body:
This resource pack adds custom text effects using vanilla Minecraft shaders. Currently, version 1.0. There are only three effects.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e2e1da97bc964af4fd4a90037a91ce41dccfd38.png)

1. Shake effect - `/tellraw @s {"text":" Test Text","color":"#FF5270"}`
2. Bloody effect - `/tellraw @s {"text":" Test Text","color":"#B5CEA8"}`
3. Elite effect - `/tellraw @s {"text":" Test Text","color":"#FFFF54"}`
